scripts.copy: cp src/manifest.json dist/ && cp -r icons dist/ && cp src/content/content.css dist/content/ && cp src/popup/popup.html dist/popup/
scripts.bundle: npx esbuild src/background/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/background/index.js && npx esbuild src/content/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/content/index.js && npx esbuild src/popup/popup.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/popup/popup.js
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run bundle && npm run copy
